name: Observable Timing Discrepancy
description: Two separate operations require different amounts of time to complete in a way that is observable and reveals security-relevant information. Attackers exploit timing variations to infer internal state, particularly in cryptographic operations where timing differences can reveal properties of private keys.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH or CONTROL nodes (password comparison, cryptographic operation, token validation) where execution time varies based on input or internal state, flowing to EGRESS nodes (response) without a TRANSFORM node (constant-time comparison/operation) ensuring uniform execution time regardless of input values or match position.
